childhood.familyBackground: Son of businessman with family business in Pune. Family involved in trading and commerce.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 푼네 가족 사업을 가진 사업가의 아들. 무역 및 상업에 관여한 가족
childhood.education: University of Pune (Commerce), London School of Economics (postgraduate)
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in Pune business environment. Developed early interest in finance and commercial banking through family exposure.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 푼에 사업 환경에서 성장. 가족 노출을 통한 금융 및 상업 은행에 관심 개발

careerTimeline.event: Founded Kotak Mahindra Finance for vehicle financing
careerTimeline.eventKo: 자동차 금융을 위한 Kotak Mahindra Finance 설립

careerTimeline.event: Established Kotak Mahindra Bank as comprehensive financial services company
careerTimeline.eventKo: 종합 금융 서비스 회사로 Kotak Mahindra Bank 설립

careerTimeline.event: Became Managing Director and CEO of Kotak Mahindra Bank
careerTimeline.eventKo: Kotak Mahindra Bank의 경영이사 및 CEO 되심

careerTimeline.event: Expanded banking operations to become major Indian financial services group
careerTimeline.eventKo: 주요 인도 금융 서비스 그룹이 되도록 은행 운영 확장

failures.description: Faced challenges during global financial crisis affecting investment portfolios and lending business
failures.descriptionKo: 투자 포트폴리오 및 대출 사업에 영향을 미치는 글로벌 금융 위기 중 도전
failures.lesson: Improved risk management, focused on conservative lending practices and diversified financial services
failures.lessonKo: 위험 관리 개선, 보수적 대출 관행 및 다각화 금융 서비스에 집중

quotes.text: Banking is about understanding people and building trust through transparent financial services
quotes.textKo: 은행 업무는 사람을 이해하고 투명한 금융 서비스를 통해 신뢰를 구축하는 것입니다
quotes.context: On banking philosophy and customer service
quotes.contextKo: 은행 철학 및 고객 서비스에 관해

recommended.title: The Alchemists
recommended.author: Neil Irwin
recommended.note: On banking, finance, and economic policy
recommended.noteKo: 은행, 금융, 경제 정책에 관한 책

personalTraits.knownFor: Kotak Mahindra Bank founder and leader, Indian banking innovator, financial services entrepreneur
personalTraits.knownForKo: Kotak Mahindra Bank 창립자 및 리더, 인도 은행 혁신가, 금융 서비스 기업가
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports education, healthcare, and social development programs in India
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 인도의 교육, 의료, 사회 개발 프로그램 지원
